L1.area: Chart utility and schema validation logic

L2.description: A null pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the schema validation logic where processing a crafted JSON Schema file can cause an unrecoverable panic, leading to denial of service. The schema parser creates array data structures from certain malformed inputs that trigger a memory violation.

L3.area: JSON Schema validation handling within the chart utility package
L3.description: A null pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the JSON Schema validation logic where a crafted schema file triggers an unrecoverable panic during chart values validation against a schema. The schema parser creates array data structures from certain malformed inputs that cause a memory violation, leading to denial of service.

ground_truth.reason: The ValidateAgainstSingleSchema function in the chartutil package does not recover from panics caused by malformed JSON Schema files, allowing a crafted schema to trigger a nil pointer dereference that crashes the application.
